content: agent1: implementing IsPhoneNumber validator in dirty_equals/_other.py and dirty_equals/__init__.py. Will add new class, minimal touch to __init__.py exports list.

I added IsPhoneNumber after FunctionCheck in _other.py, and inserted IsPhoneNumber into the import/__all__ lines in __init__.py. My patch will only include my IsPhoneNumber changes.
